TIMING_IMPROVEMENT.description: Techniques to improve timing slack across the design.

techniques.name: Pipeline insertion
techniques.description: Add register stages on critical paths

techniques.name: Clock period adjustment
techniques.description: Relax clock period for critical paths

AREA_OPTIMIZATION.description: Techniques to reduce die area and cell count.

techniques.name: Cell downsizing
techniques.description: Replace with smaller drive strength cells

techniques.name: Hierarchical partitioning
techniques.description: Partition design for better area utilization

POWER_OPTIMIZATION.description: Techniques to reduce dynamic and static power.

techniques.name: Clock gating
techniques.description: Gate clocks to inactive register banks

techniques.name: Power gating
techniques.description: Shut down power to idle blocks

techniques.name: Multi-VT cells
techniques.description: Use HVT cells for non-critical paths

techniques.name: Data gating
techniques.description: Gate data path toggling when idle

techniques.name: Cell density reduction
techniques.description: Spread cells and add placement blockages

techniques.name: Macro placement optimization
techniques.description: Optimize macro locations for routing flow

techniques.name: Routing layer assignment
techniques.description: Assign preferred routing layers per net type

techniques.name: Pin accessibility improvement
techniques.description: Improve pin access in congested regions
